headline: Elon Musk Talks About The Tesla Cybertruck Smash-Up: ''I Was Not Expecting That'
summary: Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) CEO Elon Musk opened up to Joe Rogan in a podcast last week, about the Cybertruck smash-up last year.

headline: How Bill Ackman Sources New Investment Ideas
summary: A big part of being a successful money manager or any other type of manager is surrounding yourself with a capable team and delegating responsibility based on the individual strengths and weaknesses of the team members. Few of the world's billionaires would say they got there all by themselves.

headline: Bored Of Reheated Pasta? Benzinga's Top Foods To Order Or Cook Has You Covered
summary: Restaurants are slowly opening at limited capacity across America, but most consumers are still dependent on takeaway options or cook their own food at home. For many, these options have become stale and boring but it doesn't have to be that way.

headline: Fast Money Picks For May 11
summary: On CNBC's "Fast Money Final Trade," Jeff Mills said he still likes stay-at-home stocks. He wants to buy Electronic Arts Inc. (NASDAQ: EA).

headline: The Week Ahead In Biotech: Virtual Conference Presentations, Clovis PDUFA Date In The Spotlight
summary: The smid-cap biotech earnings deluge hit Wall Street in the week ended May 9, positively impacting the stocks in the sector. The iShares NASDAQ Biotechnology Index (NASDAQ: IBB) gained about 6% for the week.

headline: NYC Mayor Bill de Blasio  Tweets: This week the FDA approved the use of Remdesivir to treat severely ill COVID-19 patients. The initial clinical trials shows it decreased hospital stays from 15 to 11 days. That's promising.
Trump Administration and Semiconductor Companies Including Intel Looking to Jump-start Development of New Chip Factories in the U.S.
Mike Khouw's Tesla Options Trade: All-Time High A Resistance Level
summary: On CNBC's "Options Action," Mike Khouw suggested an options trade in Tesla Inc (NASDAQ: TSLA).
